description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in practical, urban attire suitable for outdoor activities. He wears a long-sleeve pullover with a high collar and a scarf or cowl around his neck, paired with knee-length cargo pants and sturdy boots. Protective gloves cover his hands, and he has knee pads strapped over his pants, suggesting readiness for physical activity or rough terrain. A crossbody satchel and a round pendant necklace are visible, adding functional and personal details to his appearance. His hair is styled in a short, tied-back manner, and his overall look is casual yet prepared, blending utility with comfort. The figure's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly outstretched and feet shoulder-width apart.
description: An adult male pedestrian in practical urban clothing, featuring a pullover, cargo pants, boots, gloves, and accessories like a satchel and necklace. His stance is upright and ready, with a short tied-back hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pullover, scarf, gloves, satchel, necklace, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the satchel strap, and the tied-back hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the pullover, satchel, and the tied-back hair, with both gloves and boots visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, gloves, and the satchel resting on the hip, with the hairstyle visible from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual pullover with high collar, cargo pants, protective gloves, knee pads, and a scarf or cowl
attribute_hairstyle: short hair tied back in a small bun
